message.content:
Проведи глубокий анализ производительности библиотеки DGCharts по пути `/Users/mkozin/Developer/dgcharts/Source/Charts/`.

Конфигурация чарта в проекте (важно для понимания какие пути кода активны):
- `leftAxis.enabled = false` — левая ось отключена
- `rightAxis.labelPosition = .insideChart` — правая ось, лейблы внутри
- `legend.enabled = false` — легенда отключена
- `pinchZoomEnabled = true`, `dragXEnabled = true` — зум и drag активны
- Чарт — `LineChartView`, данные обновляются в live-режиме (~1 раз в секунду)
- `_autoScaleMinMaxEnabled = false` — autoScale отключён

Что уже сделано (не нужно переизобретать):
- `legendRenderer` заменён на `NoOpLegendRenderer` — `computeLegend` и `renderLegend` — no-op
- `leftYAxisRenderer`, `rightYAxisRenderer` заменены на `CachingYAxisRenderer` — кэширует `computeAxis` по `(min, max, inverted, touchMatrix)` и `transformedPositions()` по `(touchMatrix, entryCount)`
- `xAxisRenderer` заменён на `CachingXAxisRenderer` — кэширует `computeAxis` по `(min, max, inverted, touchMatrix)`

Ищи конкретно в активных путях кода:
1. Методы рендера которые вызываются каждый кадр (`draw`, `renderAxisLabels`, `renderGridLines`, `renderAxisLine`, `drawDataSet`, `drawValues`, `drawHighlighted`) — тяжёлые аллокации, повторные вычисления без кэша
2. В `LineChartRenderer` и его базовых классах — как рисуются линии, есть ли лишние CGPath операции
3. `XAxisRenderer` — `renderAxisLabels`, `renderGridLines` — есть ли дублирование `transformedPositions` аналогичное Y-оси
4. `BarLineChartViewBase.draw()` — порядок вызовов, что можно пропустить при нашей конфигурации
5. Любые `NSString.size`, CGFont, CGPath создания внутри draw-методов

Для каждой находки: файл + строка + код + почему это лишняя работа в нашем сценарии. Только реальные находки с конкретными строками.

- pr: Wrap current uncommitted changes into a Feature/RAD-XXXX branch and open a Bitbucket PR.
- post-merge: Sync main after a PR has been merged (git checkout main + pull --ff-only + make).
- pdf-viewer:open: Open a PDF in the interactive viewer
- pdf-viewer:sign: Place a signature or initials image on a PDF
- pdf-viewer:fill-form: Fill PDF form fields interactively with live visual feedback
- pdf-viewer:annotate: Collaboratively annotate a PDF — propose markup, review together, iterate
- anthropic-skills:consolidate-memory: Reflective pass over your memory files — merge duplicates, fix stale facts, prune the index.
- anthropic-skills:xlsx: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved.
- anthropic-skills:docx: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation.
- anthropic-skills:skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- anthropic-skills:setup-cowork: Guided Cowork setup — install role-matched plugins, connect your tools, try a skill.
- anthropic-skills:pptx: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:pdf: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:extract-design: Extract the full design language from any website URL. Produces 8 output files including AI-optimized markdown, visual HTML preview, Tailwind config, React theme, shadcn/ui theme, Figma variables, W3C design tokens, and CSS variables. Also runs WCAG accessibility scoring. Use when user says 'extract design', 'get design system', 'design language', 'design tokens', 'what colors/fonts does this site use', or '/extract-design'.
- pdf-viewer:view-pdf: Interactive PDF viewer. Use when the user wants to open, show, or view a PDF and collaborate on it visually — annotate, highlight, stamp, fill form fields, place signature/initials, or review markup together. Not for summarization or text extraction (use native Read instead).
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

364	        // calculate / set x-axis range
365	        xAxis.calculate(min: data?.xMin ?? 0.0, max: data?.xMax ?? 0.0)
366	        
367	        // calculate axis range (min / max) according to provided data
368	        leftAxis.calculate(min: data?.getYMin(axis: .left) ?? 0.0, max: data?.getYMax(axis: .left) ?? 0.0)
369	        rightAxis.calculate(min: data?.getYMin(axis: .right) ?? 0.0, max: data?.getYMax(axis: .right) ?? 0.0)

372	    internal func calculateLegendOffsets(offsetLeft: inout CGFloat, offsetTop: inout CGFloat, offsetRight: inout CGFloat, offsetBottom: inout CGFloat)
373	    {
374	        // setup offsets for legend
375	        if legend.isEnabled, !legend.drawInside
376	        {
377	            switch legend.orientation
378	            {
379	            case .vertical:
380	                
381	                switch legend.horizontalAlignment
382	                {
383	                case .left:
384	                    offsetLeft += min(legend.neededWidth, viewPortHandler.chartWidth * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.xOffset
385	                    
386	                case .right:
387	                    offsetRight += min(legend.neededWidth, viewPortHandler.chartWidth * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.xOffset
388	                    
389	                case .center:
390	                    
391	                    switch legend.verticalAlignment
392	                    {
393	                    case .top:
394	                        offsetTop += min(legend.neededHeight, viewPortHandler.chartHeight * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.yOffset
395	                        
396	                    case .bottom:
397	                        offsetBottom += min(legend.neededHeight, viewPortHandler.chartHeight * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.yOffset
398	                        
399	                    default:
400	                        break
401	                    }
402	                }
403	                
404	            case .horizontal:
405	                
406	                switch legend.verticalAlignment
407	                {
408	                case .top:
409	                    offsetTop += min(legend.neededHeight, viewPortHandler.chartHeight * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.yOffset
410	                    
411	                case .bottom:
412	                    offsetBottom += min(legend.neededHeight, viewPortHandler.chartHeight * legend.maxSizePercent) + legend.yOffset
413	                    
414	                default:
415	                    break
416	                }
417	            }
418	        }
419	    }

421	    internal override func calculateOffsets()
422	    {
423	        if !_customViewPortEnabled
424	        {
425	            var offsetLeft = CGFloat(0.0)
426	            var offsetRight = CGFloat(0.0)
427	            var offsetTop = CGFloat(0.0)
428	            var offsetBottom = CGFloat(0.0)
429	            
430	            calculateLegendOffsets(offsetLeft: &offsetLeft,
431	                                   offsetTop: &offsetTop,
432	                                   offsetRight: &offsetRight,
433	                                   offsetBottom: &offsetBottom)
434	            
435	            // offsets for y-labels
436	            if leftAxis.needsOffset
437	            {
438	                offsetLeft += leftAxis.requiredSize().width
439	            }
440	            
441	            if rightAxis.needsOffset
442	            {
443	                offsetRight += rightAxis.requiredSize().width
444	            }
445	
446	            if xAxis.isEnabled && xAxis.isDrawLabelsEnabled
447	            {
448	                let xlabelheight = xAxis.labelRotatedHeight + xAxis.yOffset
449	                
450	                // offsets for x-labels
451	                if xAxis.labelPosition == .bottom
452	                {
453	                    offsetBottom += xlabelheight
454	                }
455	                else if xAxis.labelPosition == .top
456	                {
457	                    offsetTop += xlabelheight
458	                }
459	                else if xAxis.labelPosition == .bothSided
460	                {
461	                    offsetBottom += xlabelheight
462	                    offsetTop += xlabelheight
463	                }
464	            }
465	            
466	            offsetTop += self.extraTopOffset
467	            offsetRight += self.extraRightOffset
468	            offsetBottom += self.extraBottomOffset
469	            offsetLeft += self.extraLeftOffset
470	
471	            viewPortHandler.restrainViewPort(
472	                offsetLeft: max(self.minOffset, offsetLeft),
473	                offsetTop: max(self.minOffset, offsetTop),
474	                offsetRight: max(self.minOffset, offsetRight),
475	                offsetBottom: max(self.minOffset, offsetBottom))
476	        }
477	        
478	        prepareOffsetMatrix()
479	        prepareValuePxMatrix()
480	    }

532	    @objc private func tapGestureRecognized(_ recognizer: NSUITapGestureRecognizer)
533	    {
534	        if data === nil
535	        {
536	            return
537	        }
538	        
539	        if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.ended
540	        {
541	            if !isHighLightPerTapEnabled { return }
542	            
543	            let h = getHighlightByTouchPoint(recognizer.location(in: self))
544	            
545	            if h === nil || h == self.lastHighlighted
546	            {
547	                lastHighlighted = nil
548	                highlightValue(nil, callDelegate: true)
549	            }
550	            else
551	            {
552	                lastHighlighted = h
553	                highlightValue(h, callDelegate: true)
554	            }
555	        }
556	    }

558	    @objc private func doubleTapGestureRecognized(_ recognizer: NSUITapGestureRecognizer)
559	    {
560	        if data === nil
561	        {
562	            return
563	        }
564	        
565	        if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.ended
566	        {
567	            if data !== nil && _doubleTapToZoomEnabled && (data?.entryCount ?? 0) > 0
568	            {
569	                var location = recognizer.location(in: self)
570	                location.x = location.x - viewPortHandler.offsetLeft
571	                
572	                if isTouchInverted()
573	                {
574	                    location.y = -(location.y - viewPortHandler.offsetTop)
575	                }
576	                else
577	                {
578	                    location.y = -(self.bounds.size.height - location.y - viewPortHandler.offsetBottom)
579	                }
580	                
581	                self.zoom(scaleX: isScaleXEnabled ? 1.4 : 1.0, scaleY: isScaleYEnabled ? 1.4 : 1.0, x: location.x, y: location.y)
582	                delegate?.chartScaled?(self, scaleX: scaleX, scaleY: scaleY)
583	            }
584	        }
585	    }

678	    @objc private func panGestureRecognized(_ recognizer: NSUIPanGestureRecognizer)
679	    {
680	        if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.began && recognizer.nsuiNumberOfTouches() > 0
681	        {
682	            stopDeceleration()
683	            
684	            if data === nil || !self.isDragEnabled
685	            { // If we have no data, we have nothing to pan and no data to highlight
686	                return
687	            }
688	            
689	            // If drag is enabled and we are in a position where there's something to drag:
690	            //  * If we're zoomed in, then obviously we have something to drag.
691	            //  * If we have a drag offset - we always have something to drag
692	            if !self.hasNoDragOffset || !self.isFullyZoomedOut
693	            {
694	                _isDragging = true
695	                
696	                _closestDataSetToTouch = getDataSetByTouchPoint(point: recognizer.nsuiLocationOfTouch(0, inView: self))
697	                
698	                var translation = recognizer.translation(in: self)
699	                if !self.dragXEnabled
700	                {
701	                    translation.x = 0.0
702	                }
703	                else if !self.dragYEnabled
704	                {
705	                    translation.y = 0.0
706	                }
707	                
708	                let didUserDrag = translation.x != 0.0 || translation.y != 0.0
709	                
710	                // Check to see if user dragged at all and if so, can the chart be dragged by the given amount
711	                if didUserDrag && !performPanChange(translation: translation)
712	                {
713	                    if _outerScrollView !== nil
714	                    {
715	                        // We can stop dragging right now, and let the scroll view take control
716	                        _outerScrollView = nil
717	                        _isDragging = false
718	                    }
719	                }
720	                else
721	                {
722	                    if _outerScrollView !== nil
723	                    {
724	                        // Prevent the parent scroll view from scrolling
725	                        _outerScrollView?.nsuiIsScrollEnabled = false
726	                    }
727	                }
728	                
729	                _lastPanPoint = recognizer.translation(in: self)
730	            }
731	            else if self.isHighlightPerDragEnabled
732	            {
733	                // We will only handle highlights on NSUIGestureRecognizerState.Changed
734	                
735	                _isDragging = false
736	                
737	                // Prevent the parent scroll view from scrolling
738	                _outerScrollView?.nsuiIsScrollEnabled = false
739	
740	            }
741	        }
742	        else if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.changed
743	        {
744	            if _isDragging
745	            {
746	                let originalTranslation = recognizer.translation(in: self)
747	                var translation = CGPoint(x: originalTranslation.x - _lastPanPoint.x, y: originalTranslation.y - _lastPanPoint.y)
748	                
749	                if !self.dragXEnabled
750	                {
751	                    translation.x = 0.0
752	                }
753	                else if !self.dragYEnabled
754	                {
755	                    translation.y = 0.0
756	                }
757	                
758	                let _ = performPanChange(translation: translation)
759	                
760	                _lastPanPoint = originalTranslation
761	            }
762	            else if isHighlightPerDragEnabled
763	            {
764	                let h = getHighlightByTouchPoint(recognizer.location(in: self))
765	                
766	                let lastHighlighted = self.lastHighlighted
767	                
768	                if h != lastHighlighted
769	                {
770	                    self.lastHighlighted = h
771	                    self.highlightValue(h, callDelegate: true)
772	                }
773	            }
774	        }
775	        else if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.ended || recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.cancelled
776	        {
777	            if _isDragging
778	            {
779	                if recognizer.state == NSUIGestureRecognizerState.ended && isDragDecelerationEnabled
780	                {
781	                    stopDeceleration()
782	                    
783	                    _decelerationLastTime = CACurrentMediaTime()
784	                    _decelerationVelocity = recognizer.velocity(in: self)
785	                    
786	                    _decelerationDisplayLink = NSUIDisplayLink(target: self, selector: #selector(BarLineChartViewBase.decelerationLoop))
787	                    _decelerationDisplayLink.add(to: RunLoop.main, forMode: RunLoop.Mode.common)
788	                }
789	                
790	                _isDragging = false
791	            }
792	            
793	            if _outerScrollView !== nil
794	            {
795	                _outerScrollView?.nsuiIsScrollEnabled = true
796	                _outerScrollView = nil
797	            }
798	
799	            delegate?.chartViewDidEndPanning?(self)
800	        }
801	    }
802	    
803	    private func performPanChange(translation: CGPoint) -> Bool
804	    {
805	        var translation = translation
806	        
807	        if isTouchInverted()
808	        {
809	            if self is HorizontalBarChartView
810	            {
811	                translation.x = -translation.x
812	            }
813	            else
814	            {
815	                translation.y = -translation.y
816	            }
817	        }
818	        
819	        let originalMatrix = viewPortHandler.touchMatrix
820	        
821	        var matrix = CGAffineTransform(translationX: translation.x, y: translation.y)
822	        matrix = originalMatrix.concatenating(matrix)
823	        
824	        matrix = viewPortHandler.refresh(newMatrix: matrix, chart: self, invalidate: true)
825	        
826	        if matrix != originalMatrix
827	        {
828	            delegate?.chartTranslated?(self, dX: translation.x, dY: translation.y)
829	        }
830	        
831	        // Did we managed to actually drag or did we reach the edge?
832	        return matrix.tx != originalMatrix.tx || matrix.ty != originalMatrix.ty
833	    }
834	    
835	    private func isTouchInverted() -> Bool
836	    {
837	        return isAnyAxisInverted &&
838	            _closestDataSetToTouch !== nil &&
839	            getAxis(_closestDataSetToTouch.axisDependency).isInverted
840	    }
841	    
842	    @objc open func stopDeceleration()
843	    {
844	        if _decelerationDisplayLink !== nil
845	        {
846	            _decelerationDisplayLink.remove(from: RunLoop.main, forMode: RunLoop.Mode.common)
847	            _decelerationDisplayLink = nil
848	        }
849	    }
850	    
851	    @objc private func decelerationLoop()
852	    {
853	        let currentTime = CACurrentMediaTime()
854	        
855	        _decelerationVelocity.x *= self.dragDecelerationFrictionCoef
856	        _decelerationVelocity.y *= self.dragDecelerationFrictionCoef
857	        
858	        let timeInterval = CGFloat(currentTime - _decelerationLastTime)
859	        
860	        let distance = CGPoint(
861	            x: _decelerationVelocity.x * timeInterval,
862	            y: _decelerationVelocity.y * timeInterval
863	        )
864	        
865	        if !performPanChange(translation: distance)
866	        {
867	            // We reached the edge, stop
868	            _decelerationVelocity.x = 0.0
869	            _decelerationVelocity.y = 0.0
870	        }
871	        
872	        _decelerationLastTime = currentTime
873	        
874	        if abs(_decelerationVelocity.x) < 0.001 && abs(_decelerationVelocity.y) < 0.001
875	        {
876	            stopDeceleration()
877	            
878	            // Range might have changed, which means that Y-axis labels could have changed in size, affecting Y-axis size. So we need to recalculate offsets.
879	            calculateOffsets()
880	            setNeedsDisplay()
881	        }
882	    }

884	    private func nsuiGestureRecognizerShouldBegin(_ gestureRecognizer: NSUIGestureRecognizer) -> Bool
885	    {
886	        if gestureRecognizer == _panGestureRecognizer
887	        {
888	            let velocity = _panGestureRecognizer.velocity(in: self)
889	            if data === nil || !isDragEnabled ||
890	                (self.hasNoDragOffset && self.isFullyZoomedOut && !self.isHighlightPerDragEnabled) ||
891	                (!_dragYEnabled && abs(velocity.y) > abs(velocity.x)) ||
892	                (!_dragXEnabled && abs(velocity.y) < abs(velocity.x))
893	            {
894	                return false
895	            }
896	        }
897	        else
898	        {
899	            #if !os(tvOS)
900	                if gestureRecognizer == _pinchGestureRecognizer
901	                {
902	                    if data === nil || (!_pinchZoomEnabled && !_scaleXEnabled && !_scaleYEnabled)
903	                    {
904	                        return false
905	                    }
906	                }
907	            #endif
908	        }
909	        
910	        return true
911	    }

932	    open func gestureRecognizer(_ gestureRecognizer: NSUIGestureRecognizer, shouldRecognizeSimultaneouslyWith otherGestureRecognizer: NSUIGestureRecognizer) -> Bool
933	    {
934	        #if !os(tvOS)
935	            if ((gestureRecognizer is NSUIPinchGestureRecognizer && otherGestureRecognizer is NSUIPanGestureRecognizer) ||
936	                (gestureRecognizer is NSUIPanGestureRecognizer && otherGestureRecognizer is NSUIPinchGestureRecognizer))
937	            {
938	                return true
939	            }
940	        #endif
941	        
942	        if gestureRecognizer is NSUIPanGestureRecognizer,
943	            otherGestureRecognizer is NSUIPanGestureRecognizer,
944	            gestureRecognizer == _panGestureRecognizer
945	        {
946	            var scrollView = self.superview
947	            while scrollView != nil && !(scrollView is NSUIScrollView)
948	            {
949	                scrollView = scrollView?.superview
950	            }
951	            
952	            // If there is two scrollview together, we pick the superview of the inner scrollview.
953	            // In the case of UITableViewWrepperView, the superview will be UITableView
954	            if let superViewOfScrollView = scrollView?.superview,
955	                superViewOfScrollView is NSUIScrollView
956	            {
957	                scrollView = superViewOfScrollView
958	            }
959	
960	            var foundScrollView = scrollView as? NSUIScrollView
961	            
962	            if !(foundScrollView?.nsuiIsScrollEnabled ?? true)
963	            {
964	                foundScrollView = nil
965	            }
966	            
967	            let scrollViewPanGestureRecognizer = foundScrollView?.nsuiGestureRecognizers?.first {
968	                $0 is NSUIPanGestureRecognizer
969	            }
970	            
971	            if otherGestureRecognizer === scrollViewPanGestureRecognizer
972	            {
973	                _outerScrollView = foundScrollView
974	                
975	                return true
976	            }
977	        }
978	        
979	        return false
980	    }

1021	    /// Zooms in or out by the given scale factor. x and y are the coordinates
1022	    /// (in pixels) of the zoom center.
1023	    ///
1024	    /// - Parameters:
1025	    ///   - scaleX: if < 1 --> zoom out, if > 1 --> zoom in
1026	    ///   - scaleY: if < 1 --> zoom out, if > 1 --> zoom in
1027	    ///   - x:
1028	    ///   - y:
1029	    @objc open func zoom(
1030	        scaleX: CGFloat,
1031	               scaleY: CGFloat,
1032	               x: CGFloat,

content.content:
1	//
2	//  LineChartRenderer.swift
3	//  Charts

10	//
11	
12	import Foundation
13	import CoreGraphics
14	
15	open class LineChartRenderer: LineRadarRenderer
16	{
17	    // TODO: Currently, this nesting isn't necessary for LineCharts. However, it will make it much easier to add a custom rotor
18	    // that navigates between datasets.
19	    // NOTE: Unlike the other renderers, LineChartRenderer populates accessibleChartElements in drawCircles due to the nature of its drawing options.
20	    /// A nested array of elements ordered logically (i.e not in visual/drawing order) for use with VoiceOver.
21	    private lazy var accessibilityOrderedElements: [[NSUIAccessibilityElement]] = accessibilityCreateEmptyOrderedElements()
22	
23	    @objc open weak var dataProvider: LineChartDataProvider?
24	    
25	    @objc public init(dataProvider: LineChartDataProvider, animator: Animator, viewPortHandler: ViewPortHandler)
26	    {
27	        super.init(animator: animator, viewPortHandler: viewPortHandler)
28	        
29	        self.dataProvider = dataProvider
30	    }
31	    
32	    open override func drawData(context: CGContext)
33	    {
34	        guard let lineData = dataProvider?.lineData else { return }
35	
36	        let sets = lineData.dataSets as? [LineChartDataSet]
37	        assert(sets != nil, "Datasets for LineChartRenderer must conform to ILineChartDataSet")
38	
39	        let drawDataSet = { self.drawDataSet(context: context, dataSet: $0) }
40	        sets!.lazy
41	            .filter(\.isVisible)
42	            .forEach(drawDataSet)
43	    }
44	    
45	    @objc open func drawDataSet(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol)
46	    {
47	        if dataSet.entryCount < 1
48	        {
49	            return
50	        }
51	        
52	        context.saveGState()
53	        
54	        context.setLineWidth(dataSet.lineWidth)
55	        if dataSet.lineDashLengths != nil
56	        {
57	            context.setLineDash(phase: dataSet.lineDashPhase, lengths: dataSet.lineDashLengths!)
58	        }
59	        else
60	        {
61	            context.setLineDash(phase: 0.0, lengths: [])
62	        }
63	        
64	        context.setLineCap(dataSet.lineCapType)
65	        
66	        // if drawing cubic lines is enabled
67	        switch dataSet.mode
68	        {
69	        case .linear: fallthrough
70	        case .stepped:
71	            drawLinear(context: context, dataSet: dataSet)
72	            
73	        case .cubicBezier:
74	            drawCubicBezier(context: context, dataSet: dataSet)
75	            
76	        case .horizontalBezier:
77	            drawHorizontalBezier(context: context, dataSet: dataSet)
78	        }
79	        
80	        context.restoreGState()
81	    }
82	
83	    private func drawLine(
84	        context: CGContext,
85	        spline: CGMutablePath,
86	        drawingColor: NSUIColor)
87	    {
88	        context.beginPath()
89	        context.addPath(spline)
90	        context.setStrokeColor(drawingColor.cgColor)
91	        context.strokePath()
92	    }
93	    
94	    @objc open func drawCubicBezier(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol)
95	    {
96	        guard let dataProvider = dataProvider else { return }
97	        
98	        let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: dataSet.axisDependency)
99	        
100	        let phaseY = animator.phaseY
101	        
102	        _xBounds.set(chart: dataProvider, dataSet: dataSet, animator: animator)
103	        
104	        // get the color that is specified for this position from the DataSet
105	        let drawingColor = dataSet.colors.first!
106	        
107	        let intensity = dataSet.cubicIntensity
108	        
109	        // the path for the cubic-spline
110	        let cubicPath = CGMutablePath()
111	        
112	        let valueToPixelMatrix = trans.valueToPixelMatrix
113	        
114	        if _xBounds.range >= 1
115	        {
116	            var prevDx: CGFloat = 0.0
117	            var prevDy: CGFloat = 0.0
118	            var curDx: CGFloat = 0.0
119	            var curDy: CGFloat = 0.0
120	            
121	            // Take an extra point from the left, and an extra from the right.
122	            // That's because we need 4 points for a cubic bezier (cubic=4), otherwise we get lines moving and doing weird stuff on the edges of the chart.
123	            // So in the starting `prev` and `cur`, go -2, -1
124	            
125	            let firstIndex = _xBounds.min + 1
126	            
127	            var prevPrev: ChartDataEntry! = nil
128	            var prev: ChartDataEntry! = dataSet.entryForIndex(max(firstIndex - 2, 0))
129	            var cur: ChartDataEntry! = dataSet.entryForIndex(max(firstIndex - 1, 0))
130	            var next: ChartDataEntry! = cur
131	            var nextIndex: Int = -1
132	            
133	            if cur == nil { return }
134	            
135	            // let the spline start
136	            cubicPath.move(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(cur.x), y: CGFloat(cur.y * phaseY)), transform: valueToPixelMatrix)
137	            
138	            for j in _xBounds.dropFirst()  // same as firstIndex
139	            {
140	                prevPrev = prev
141	                prev = cur
142	                cur = nextIndex == j ? next : dataSet.entryForIndex(j)
143	                
144	                nextIndex = j + 1 < dataSet.entryCount ? j + 1 : j
145	                next = dataSet.entryForIndex(nextIndex)
146	                
147	                if next == nil { break }
148	                
149	                prevDx = CGFloat(cur.x - prevPrev.x) * intensity
150	                prevDy = CGFloat(cur.y - prevPrev.y) * intensity
151	                curDx = CGFloat(next.x - prev.x) * intensity
152	                curDy = CGFloat(next.y - prev.y) * intensity
153	                
154	                cubicPath.addCurve(
155	                    to: CGPoint(
156	                        x: CGFloat(cur.x),
157	                        y: CGFloat(cur.y) * CGFloat(phaseY)),
158	                    control1: CGPoint(
159	                        x: CGFloat(prev.x) + prevDx,
160	                        y: (CGFloat(prev.y) + prevDy) * CGFloat(phaseY)),
161	                    control2: CGPoint(
162	                        x: CGFloat(cur.x) - curDx,
163	                        y: (CGFloat(cur.y) - curDy) * CGFloat(phaseY)),
164	                    transform: valueToPixelMatrix)
165	            }
166	        }
167	        
168	        context.saveGState()
169	        defer { context.restoreGState() }
170	
171	        if dataSet.isDrawFilledEnabled
172	        {
173	            // Copy this path because we make changes to it
174	            let fillPath = cubicPath.mutableCopy()
175	            
176	            drawCubicFill(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, spline: fillPath!, matrix: valueToPixelMatrix, bounds: _xBounds)
177	        }
178	
179	        if dataSet.isDrawLineWithGradientEnabled
180	        {
181	            drawGradientLine(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, spline: cubicPath, matrix: valueToPixelMatrix)
182	        }
183	        else
184	        {
185	            drawLine(context: context, spline: cubicPath, drawingColor: drawingColor)
186	        }
187	    }
188	    
189	    @objc open func drawHorizontalBezier(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol)
190	    {
191	        guard let dataProvider = dataProvider else { return }
192	        
193	        let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: dataSet.axisDependency)
194	        
195	        let phaseY = animator.phaseY
196	        
197	        _xBounds.set(chart: dataProvider, dataSet: dataSet, animator: animator)
198	        
199	        // get the color that is specified for this position from the DataSet
200	        let drawingColor = dataSet.colors.first!
201	        
202	        // the path for the cubic-spline
203	        let cubicPath = CGMutablePath()
204	        
205	        let valueToPixelMatrix = trans.valueToPixelMatrix
206	        
207	        if _xBounds.range >= 1
208	        {
209	            var prev: ChartDataEntry! = dataSet.entryForIndex(_xBounds.min)
210	            var cur: ChartDataEntry! = prev
211	            
212	            if cur == nil { return }
213	            
214	            // let the spline start
215	            cubicPath.move(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(cur.x), y: CGFloat(cur.y * phaseY)), transform: valueToPixelMatrix)
216	            
217	            for j in _xBounds.dropFirst()
218	            {
219	                prev = cur
220	                cur = dataSet.entryForIndex(j)
221	                
222	                let cpx = CGFloat(prev.x + (cur.x - prev.x) / 2.0)
223	                
224	                cubicPath.addCurve(
225	                    to: CGPoint(
226	                        x: CGFloat(cur.x),
227	                        y: CGFloat(cur.y * phaseY)),
228	                    control1: CGPoint(
229	                        x: cpx,
230	                        y: CGFloat(prev.y * phaseY)),
231	                    control2: CGPoint(
232	                        x: cpx,
233	                        y: CGFloat(cur.y * phaseY)),
234	                    transform: valueToPixelMatrix)
235	            }
236	        }
237	        
238	        context.saveGState()
239	        defer { context.restoreGState() }
240	        
241	        if dataSet.isDrawFilledEnabled
242	        {
243	            // Copy this path because we make changes to it
244	            let fillPath = cubicPath.mutableCopy()
245	            
246	            drawCubicFill(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, spline: fillPath!, matrix: valueToPixelMatrix, bounds: _xBounds)
247	        }
248	
249	        if dataSet.isDrawLineWithGradientEnabled
250	        {
251	            drawGradientLine(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, spline: cubicPath, matrix: valueToPixelMatrix)
252	        }
253	        else
254	        {
255	            drawLine(context: context, spline: cubicPath, drawingColor: drawingColor)
256	        }
257	    }
258	    
259	    open func drawCubicFill(
260	        context: CGContext,
261	        dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol,
262	        spline: CGMutablePath,
263	        matrix: CGAffineTransform,
264	        bounds: XBounds)
265	    {
266	        guard
267	            let dataProvider = dataProvider
268	        else { return }
269	        
270	        if bounds.range <= 0
271	        {
272	            return
273	        }
274	        
275	        let fillMin = dataSet.fillFormatter?.getFillLinePosition(dataSet: dataSet, dataProvider: dataProvider) ?? 0.0
276	
277	        var pt1 = CGPoint(x: CGFloat(dataSet.entryForIndex(bounds.min + bounds.range)?.x ?? 0.0), y: fillMin)
278	        var pt2 = CGPoint(x: CGFloat(dataSet.entryForIndex(bounds.min)?.x ?? 0.0), y: fillMin)
279	        pt1 = pt1.applying(matrix)
280	        pt2 = pt2.applying(matrix)
281	        
282	        spline.addLine(to: pt1)
283	        spline.addLine(to: pt2)
284	        spline.closeSubpath()
285	        
286	        if dataSet.fill != nil
287	        {
288	            drawFilledPath(context: context, path: spline, fill: dataSet.fill!, fillAlpha: dataSet.fillAlpha)
289	        }
290	        else
291	        {
292	            drawFilledPath(context: context, path: spline, fillColor: dataSet.fillColor, fillAlpha: dataSet.fillAlpha)
293	        }
294	    }
295	    
296	    private var _lineSegments = [CGPoint](repeating: CGPoint(), count: 2)
297	    
298	    @objc open func drawLinear(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol)
299	    {
300	        guard let dataProvider = dataProvider else { return }
301	        
302	        let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: dataSet.axisDependency)
303	        
304	        let valueToPixelMatrix = trans.valueToPixelMatrix
305	        
306	        let entryCount = dataSet.entryCount
307	        let isDrawSteppedEnabled = dataSet.mode == .stepped
308	        let pointsPerEntryPair = isDrawSteppedEnabled ? 4 : 2
309	        
310	        let phaseY = animator.phaseY
311	        
312	        _xBounds.set(chart: dataProvider, dataSet: dataSet, animator: animator)
313	        
314	        // if drawing filled is enabled
315	        if dataSet.isDrawFilledEnabled && entryCount > 0
316	        {
317	            drawLinearFill(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, trans: trans, bounds: _xBounds)
318	        }
319	        
320	        context.saveGState()
321	        defer { context.restoreGState() }
322	
323	        // more than 1 color
324	        if dataSet.colors.count > 1, !dataSet.isDrawLineWithGradientEnabled
325	        {
326	            if _lineSegments.count != pointsPerEntryPair
327	            {
328	                // Allocate once in correct size
329	                _lineSegments = [CGPoint](repeating: CGPoint(), count: pointsPerEntryPair)
330	            }
331	
332	            for j in _xBounds.dropLast()
333	            {
334	                var e: ChartDataEntry! = dataSet.entryForIndex(j)
335	                
336	                if e == nil { continue }
337	                
338	                _lineSegments[0].x = CGFloat(e.x)
339	                _lineSegments[0].y = CGFloat(e.y * phaseY)
340	                
341	                if j < _xBounds.max
342	                {
343	                    // TODO: remove the check.
344	                    // With the new XBounds iterator, j is always smaller than _xBounds.max
345	                    // Keeping this check for a while, if xBounds have no further breaking changes, it should be safe to remove the check
346	                    e = dataSet.entryForIndex(j + 1)
347	                    
348	                    if e == nil { break }
349	                    
350	                    if isDrawSteppedEnabled
351	                    {
352	                        _lineSegments[1] = CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: _lineSegments[0].y)
353	                        _lineSegments[2] = _lineSegments[1]
354	                        _lineSegments[3] = CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: CGFloat(e.y * phaseY))
355	                    }
356	                    else
357	                    {
358	                        _lineSegments[1] = CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: CGFloat(e.y * phaseY))
359	                    }
360	                }
361	                else
362	                {
363	                    _lineSegments[1] = _lineSegments[0]
364	                }
365	
366	                _lineSegments = _lineSegments.map { $0.applying(valueToPixelMatrix) }
367	
368	                if (!viewPortHandler.isInBoundsRight(_lineSegments[0].x))
369	                {
370	                    break
371	                }
372	
373	                // Determine the start and end coordinates of the line, and make sure they differ.
374	                guard
375	                    let firstCoordinate = _lineSegments.first,
376	                    let lastCoordinate = _lineSegments.last,
377	                    firstCoordinate != lastCoordinate else { continue }
378	                
379	                // make sure the lines don't do shitty things outside bounds
380	                if !viewPortHandler.isInBoundsLeft(lastCoordinate.x) ||
381	                    !viewPortHandler.isInBoundsTop(max(firstCoordinate.y, lastCoordinate.y)) ||
382	                    !viewPortHandler.isInBoundsBottom(min(firstCoordinate.y, lastCoordinate.y))
383	                {
384	                    continue
385	                }
386	                
387	                // get the color that is set for this line-segment
388	                context.setStrokeColor(dataSet.color(atIndex: j).cgColor)
389	                context.strokeLineSegments(between: _lineSegments)
390	            }
391	        }
392	        else
393	        { // only one color per dataset
394	            guard dataSet.entryForIndex(_xBounds.min) != nil else {
395	                return
396	            }
397	
398	            var firstPoint = true
399	
400	            let path = CGMutablePath()
401	            for x in stride(from: _xBounds.min, through: _xBounds.range + _xBounds.min, by: 1)
402	            {
403	                guard let e1 = dataSet.entryForIndex(x == 0 ? 0 : (x - 1)) else { continue }
404	                guard let e2 = dataSet.entryForIndex(x) else { continue }
405	                
406	                let startPoint =
407	                    CGPoint(
408	                        x: CGFloat(e1.x),
409	                        y: CGFloat(e1.y * phaseY))
410	                    .applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
411	                
412	                if firstPoint
413	                {
414	                    path.move(to: startPoint)
415	                    firstPoint = false
416	                }
417	                else
418	                {
419	                    path.addLine(to: startPoint)
420	                }
421	                
422	                if isDrawSteppedEnabled
423	                {
424	                    let steppedPoint =
425	                        CGPoint(
426	                            x: CGFloat(e2.x),
427	                            y: CGFloat(e1.y * phaseY))
428	                        .applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
429	                    path.addLine(to: steppedPoint)
430	                }
431	
432	                let endPoint =
433	                    CGPoint(
434	                        x: CGFloat(e2.x),
435	                        y: CGFloat(e2.y * phaseY))
436	                    .applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
437	                path.addLine(to: endPoint)
438	            }
439	            
440	            if !firstPoint
441	            {
442	                if dataSet.isDrawLineWithGradientEnabled {
443	                    drawGradientLine(context: context, dataSet: dataSet, spline: path, matrix: valueToPixelMatrix)
444	                } else {
445	                    context.beginPath()
446	                    context.addPath(path)
447	                    context.setStrokeColor(dataSet.color(atIndex: 0).cgColor)
448	                    context.strokePath()
449	                }
450	            }
451	        }
452	    }

454	    open func drawLinearFill(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol, trans: Transformer, bounds: XBounds)
455	    {
456	        guard let dataProvider = dataProvider else { return }
457	        
458	        let filled = generateFilledPath(
459	            dataSet: dataSet,
460	            fillMin: dataSet.fillFormatter?.getFillLinePosition(dataSet: dataSet, dataProvider: dataProvider) ?? 0.0,
461	            bounds: bounds,
462	            matrix: trans.valueToPixelMatrix)
463	        
464	        if dataSet.fill != nil
465	        {
466	            drawFilledPath(context: context, path: filled, fill: dataSet.fill!, fillAlpha: dataSet.fillAlpha)
467	        }
468	        else
469	        {
470	            drawFilledPath(context: context, path: filled, fillColor: dataSet.fillColor, fillAlpha: dataSet.fillAlpha)
471	        }
472	    }

474	    /// Generates the path that is used for filled drawing.
475	    private func generateFilledPath(dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol, fillMin: CGFloat, bounds: XBounds, matrix: CGAffineTransform) -> CGPath
476	    {
477	        let phaseY = animator.phaseY
478	        let isDrawSteppedEnabled = dataSet.mode == .stepped
479	        let matrix = matrix
480	        
481	        var e: ChartDataEntry!
482	        
483	        let filled = CGMutablePath()
484	        
485	        e = dataSet.entryForIndex(bounds.min)
486	        if e != nil
487	        {
488	            filled.move(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: fillMin), transform: matrix)
489	            filled.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: CGFloat(e.y * phaseY)), transform: matrix)
490	        }
491	        
492	        // create a new path
493	        for x in stride(from: (bounds.min + 1), through: bounds.range + bounds.min, by: 1)
494	        {
495	            guard let e = dataSet.entryForIndex(x) else { continue }
496	            
497	            if isDrawSteppedEnabled
498	            {
499	                guard let ePrev = dataSet.entryForIndex(x-1) else { continue }
500	                filled.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: CGFloat(ePrev.y * phaseY)), transform: matrix)
501	            }
502	            
503	            filled.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: CGFloat(e.y * phaseY)), transform: matrix)
504	        }
505	        
506	        // close up
507	        e = dataSet.entryForIndex(bounds.range + bounds.min)
508	        if e != nil
509	        {
510	            filled.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: CGFloat(e.x), y: fillMin), transform: matrix)
511	        }
512	        filled.closeSubpath()
513	        
514	        return filled
515	    }

517	    open override func drawValues(context: CGContext)
518	    {
519	        guard
520	            let dataProvider = dataProvider,
521	            let lineData = dataProvider.lineData
522	        else { return }
523	
524	        if isDrawingValuesAllowed(dataProvider: dataProvider)
525	        {
526	            let phaseY = animator.phaseY
527	            
528	            var pt = CGPoint()
529	            
530	            for i in lineData.indices
531	            {
532	                guard let
533	                        dataSet = lineData[i] as? LineChartDataSetProtocol,
534	                      shouldDrawValues(forDataSet: dataSet)
535	                else { continue }
536	                
537	                let valueFont = dataSet.valueFont
538	                
539	                let formatter = dataSet.valueFormatter
540	                
541	                let angleRadians = dataSet.valueLabelAngle.DEG2RAD
542	                
543	                let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: dataSet.axisDependency)
544	                let valueToPixelMatrix = trans.valueToPixelMatrix
545	                
546	                let iconsOffset = dataSet.iconsOffset
547	                
548	                // make sure the values do not interfear with the circles
549	                var valOffset = Int(dataSet.circleRadius * 1.75)
550	                
551	                if !dataSet.isDrawCirclesEnabled
552	                {
553	                    valOffset = valOffset / 2
554	                }
555	                
556	                _xBounds.set(chart: dataProvider, dataSet: dataSet, animator: animator)
557	
558	                for j in _xBounds
559	                {
560	                    guard let e = dataSet.entryForIndex(j) else { break }
561	                    
562	                    pt.x = CGFloat(e.x)
563	                    pt.y = CGFloat(e.y * phaseY)
564	                    pt = pt.applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
565	                    
566	                    if (!viewPortHandler.isInBoundsRight(pt.x))
567	                    {
568	                        break
569	                    }
570	                    
571	                    if (!viewPortHandler.isInBoundsLeft(pt.x) || !viewPortHandler.isInBoundsY(pt.y))
572	                    {
573	                        continue
574	                    }
575	                    
576	                    if dataSet.isDrawValuesEnabled
577	                    {
578	                        context.drawText(formatter.stringForValue(e.y,
579	                                                                  entry: e,
580	                                                                  dataSetIndex: i,
581	                                                                  viewPortHandler: viewPortHandler),
582	                                         at: CGPoint(x: pt.x,
583	                                                     y: pt.y - CGFloat(valOffset) - valueFont.lineHeight),
584	                                         align: .center,
585	                                         angleRadians: angleRadians,
586	                                         attributes: [.font: valueFont,
587	                                                      .foregroundColor: dataSet.valueTextColorAt(j)])
588	                    }
589	                    
590	                    if let icon = e.icon, dataSet.isDrawIconsEnabled
591	                    {
592	                        context.drawImage(icon,
593	                                          atCenter: CGPoint(x: pt.x + iconsOffset.x,
594	                                                            y: pt.y + iconsOffset.y),
595	                                          size: icon.size)
596	                    }
597	                }
598	            }
599	        }
600	    }

607	    private func drawCircles(context: CGContext)
608	    {
609	        guard
610	            let dataProvider = dataProvider,
611	            let lineData = dataProvider.lineData
612	        else { return }
613	        
614	        let phaseY = animator.phaseY
615	        
616	        var pt = CGPoint()
617	        var rect = CGRect()
618	        
619	        // If we redraw the data, remove and repopulate accessible elements to update label values and frames
620	        accessibleChartElements.removeAll()
621	        accessibilityOrderedElements = accessibilityCreateEmptyOrderedElements()
622	
623	        // Make the chart header the first element in the accessible elements array
624	        if let chart = dataProvider as? LineChartView {
625	            let element = createAccessibleHeader(usingChart: chart,
626	                                                 andData: lineData,
627	                                                 withDefaultDescription: "Line Chart")
628	            accessibleChartElements.append(element)
629	        }
630	
631	        context.saveGState()
632	
633	        for i in lineData.indices
634	        {
635	            guard let dataSet = lineData[i] as? LineChartDataSetProtocol else { continue }
636	
637	            // Skip Circles and Accessibility if not enabled,
638	            // reduces CPU significantly if not needed
639	            if !dataSet.isVisible || !dataSet.isDrawCirclesEnabled || dataSet.entryCount == 0
640	            {
641	                continue
642	            }
643	            
644	            let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: dataSet.axisDependency)
645	            let valueToPixelMatrix = trans.valueToPixelMatrix
646	            
647	            _xBounds.set(chart: dataProvider, dataSet: dataSet, animator: animator)
648	            
649	            let circleRadius = dataSet.circleRadius
650	            let circleDiameter = circleRadius * 2.0
651	            let circleHoleRadius = dataSet.circleHoleRadius
652	            let circleHoleDiameter = circleHoleRadius * 2.0
653	            
654	            let drawCircleHole = dataSet.isDrawCircleHoleEnabled &&
655	                circleHoleRadius < circleRadius &&
656	                circleHoleRadius > 0.0
657	            let drawTransparentCircleHole = drawCircleHole &&
658	                (dataSet.circleHoleColor == nil ||
659	                    dataSet.circleHoleColor == NSUIColor.clear)
660	            
661	            for j in _xBounds
662	            {
663	                guard let e = dataSet.entryForIndex(j) else { break }
664	
665	                pt.x = CGFloat(e.x)
666	                pt.y = CGFloat(e.y * phaseY)
667	                pt = pt.applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
668	                
669	                if (!viewPortHandler.isInBoundsRight(pt.x))
670	                {
671	                    break
672	                }
673	                
674	                // make sure the circles don't do shitty things outside bounds
675	                if (!viewPortHandler.isInBoundsLeft(pt.x) || !viewPortHandler.isInBoundsY(pt.y))
676	                {
677	                    continue
678	                }
679	                
680	                // Accessibility element geometry
681	                let scaleFactor: CGFloat = 3
682	                let accessibilityRect = CGRect(x: pt.x - (scaleFactor * circleRadius),
683	                                               y: pt.y - (scaleFactor * circleRadius),
684	                                               width: scaleFactor * circleDiameter,
685	                                               height: scaleFactor * circleDiameter)
686	                // Create and append the corresponding accessibility element to accessibilityOrderedElements
687	                if let chart = dataProvider as? LineChartView
688	                {
689	                    let element = createAccessibleElement(withIndex: j,
690	                                                          container: chart,
691	                                                          dataSet: dataSet,
692	                                                          dataSetIndex: i)
693	                    { (element) in
694	                        element.accessibilityFrame = accessibilityRect
695	                    }
696	
697	                    accessibilityOrderedElements[i].append(element)
698	                }
699	
700	                context.setFillColor(dataSet.getCircleColor(atIndex: j)!.cgColor)
701	
702	                rect.origin.x = pt.x - circleRadius
703	                rect.origin.y = pt.y - circleRadius
704	                rect.size.width = circleDiameter
705	                rect.size.height = circleDiameter
706	
707	                if drawTransparentCircleHole
708	                {
709	                    // Begin path for circle with hole
710	                    context.beginPath()
711	                    context.addEllipse(in: rect)
712	                    
713	                    // Cut hole in path
714	                    rect.origin.x = pt.x - circleHoleRadius
715	                    rect.origin.y = pt.y - circleHoleRadius
716	                    rect.size.width = circleHoleDiameter
717	                    rect.size.height = circleHoleDiameter
718	                    context.addEllipse(in: rect)
719	                    
720	                    // Fill in-between
721	                    context.fillPath(using: .evenOdd)
722	                }
723	                else
724	                {
725	                    context.fillEllipse(in: rect)
726	                    
727	                    if drawCircleHole
728	                    {
729	                        context.setFillColor(dataSet.circleHoleColor!.cgColor)
730	
731	                        // The hole rect
732	                        rect.origin.x = pt.x - circleHoleRadius
733	                        rect.origin.y = pt.y - circleHoleRadius
734	                        rect.size.width = circleHoleDiameter
735	                        rect.size.height = circleHoleDiameter
736	                        
737	                        context.fillEllipse(in: rect)
738	                    }
739	                }
740	            }
741	        }
742	        
743	        context.restoreGState()
744	
745	        // Merge nested ordered arrays into the single accessibleChartElements.
746	        accessibleChartElements.append(contentsOf: accessibilityOrderedElements.flatMap { $0 } )
747	        accessibilityPostLayoutChangedNotification()
748	    }

750	    open override func drawHighlighted(context: CGContext, indices: [Highlight])
751	    {
752	        guard
753	            let dataProvider = dataProvider,
754	            let lineData = dataProvider.lineData
755	        else { return }
756	        
757	        let chartXMax = dataProvider.chartXMax
758	        
759	        context.saveGState()
760	        
761	        for high in indices
762	        {
763	            guard let set = lineData[high.dataSetIndex] as? LineChartDataSetProtocol,
764	                  set.isHighlightEnabled
765	            else { continue }
766	            
767	            guard let e = set.entryForXValue(high.x, closestToY: high.y) else { continue }
768	            
769	            if !isInBoundsX(entry: e, dataSet: set)
770	            {
771	                continue
772	            }
773	
774	            context.setStrokeColor(set.highlightColor.cgColor)
775	            context.setLineWidth(set.highlightLineWidth)
776	            if set.highlightLineDashLengths != nil
777	            {
778	                context.setLineDash(phase: set.highlightLineDashPhase, lengths: set.highlightLineDashLengths!)
779	            }
780	            else
781	            {
782	                context.setLineDash(phase: 0.0, lengths: [])
783	            }
784	            
785	            let x = e.x // get the x-position
786	            let y = e.y * Double(animator.phaseY)
787	            
788	            if x > chartXMax * animator.phaseX
789	            {
790	                continue
791	            }
792	            
793	            let trans = dataProvider.getTransformer(forAxis: set.axisDependency)
794	            
795	            let pt = trans.pixelForValues(x: x, y: y)
796	            
797	            high.setDraw(pt: pt)
798	            
799	            // draw the lines
800	            drawHighlightLines(context: context, point: pt, set: set)
801	        }
802	        
803	        context.restoreGState()
804	    }

806	    func drawGradientLine(context: CGContext, dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol, spline: CGPath, matrix: CGAffineTransform)
807	    {
808	        guard let gradientPositions = dataSet.gradientPositions else
809	        {
810	            assertionFailure("Must set `gradientPositions if `dataSet.isDrawLineWithGradientEnabled` is true")
811	            return
812	        }
813	
814	        // `insetBy` is applied since bounding box
815	        // doesn't take into account line width
816	        // so that peaks are trimmed since
817	        // gradient start and gradient end calculated wrong
818	        let boundingBox = spline.boundingBox
819	            .insetBy(dx: -dataSet.lineWidth / 2, dy: -dataSet.lineWidth / 2)
820	
821	        guard !boundingBox.isNull, !boundingBox.isInfinite, !boundingBox.isEmpty else {
822	            return
823	        }
824	
825	        let gradientStart = CGPoint(x: 0, y: boundingBox.minY)
826	        let gradientEnd = CGPoint(x: 0, y: boundingBox.maxY)
827	        let gradientColorComponents: [CGFloat] = dataSet.colors
828	            .reversed()
829	            .reduce(into: []) { (components, color) in
830	                guard let (r, g, b, a) = color.nsuirgba else {
831	                    return
832	                }
833	                components += [r, g, b, a]
834	            }
835	        let gradientLocations: [CGFloat] = gradientPositions.reversed()
836	            .map { (position) in
837	                let location = CGPoint(x: boundingBox.minX, y: position)
838	                    .applying(matrix)
839	                let normalizedLocation = (location.y - boundingBox.minY)
840	                    / (boundingBox.maxY - boundingBox.minY)
841	                return normalizedLocation.clamped(to: 0...1)
842	            }
843	
844	        let baseColorSpace = CGColorSpaceCreateDeviceRGB()
845	        guard let gradient = CGGradient(
846	                colorSpace: baseColorSpace,
847	                colorComponents: gradientColorComponents,
848	                locations: gradientLocations,
849	                count: gradientLocations.count) else {
850	            return
851	        }
852	
853	        context.saveGState()
854	        defer { context.restoreGState() }
855	
856	        context.beginPath()
857	        context.addPath(spline)
858	        context.replacePathWithStrokedPath()
859	        context.clip()
860	        context.drawLinearGradient(gradient, start: gradientStart, end: gradientEnd, options: [])
861	    }

863	    /// Creates a nested array of empty subarrays each of which will be populated with NSUIAccessibilityElements.
864	    /// This is marked internal to support HorizontalBarChartRenderer as well.
865	    private func accessibilityCreateEmptyOrderedElements() -> [[NSUIAccessibilityElement]]
866	    {
867	        guard let chart = dataProvider as? LineChartView else { return [] }
868	
869	        let dataSetCount = chart.lineData?.dataSetCount ?? 0
870	
871	        return Array(repeating: [NSUIAccessibilityElement](),
872	                     count: dataSetCount)
873	    }
874	
875	    /// Creates an NSUIAccessibleElement representing the smallest meaningful bar of the chart
876	    /// i.e. in case of a stacked chart, this returns each stack, not the combined bar.
877	    /// Note that it is marked internal to support subclass modification in the HorizontalBarChart.
878	    private func createAccessibleElement(withIndex idx: Int,
879	                                         container: LineChartView,
880	                                         dataSet: LineChartDataSetProtocol,
881	                                         dataSetIndex: Int,
882	                                         modifier: (NSUIAccessibilityElement) -> ()) -> NSUIAccessibilityElement
883	    {
884	        let element = NSUIAccessibilityElement(accessibilityContainer: container)
885	        let xAxis = container.xAxis
886	
887	        guard let e = dataSet.entryForIndex(idx) else { return element }
888	        guard let dataProvider = dataProvider else { return element }
889	
890	        // NOTE: The formatter can cause issues when the x-axis labels are consecutive ints.
891	        // i.e. due to the Double conversion, if there are more than one data set that are grouped,
892	        // there is the possibility of some labels being rounded up. A floor() might fix this, but seems to be a brute force solution.
893	        let label = xAxis.valueFormatter?.stringForValue(e.x, axis: xAxis) ?? "\(e.x)"
894	
895	        let elementValueText = dataSet.valueFormatter.stringForValue(e.y,
896	                                                                     entry: e,
897	                                                                     dataSetIndex: dataSetIndex,
898	                                                                     viewPortHandler: viewPortHandler)
899	
900	        let dataSetCount = dataProvider.lineData?.dataSetCount ?? -1
901	        let doesContainMultipleDataSets = dataSetCount > 1
902	
903	        element.accessibilityLabel = "\(doesContainMultipleDataSets ? (dataSet.label ?? "")  + ", " : "") \(label): \(elementValueText)"
904	
905	        modifier(element)
906	
907	        return element
908	    }

32	    open func computeAxis(min: Double, max: Double, inverted: Bool)
33	    {
34	        var min = min, max = max
35	        
36	        if let transformer = self.transformer,
37	            viewPortHandler.contentWidth > 10,
38	            !viewPortHandler.isFullyZoomedOutX
39	        {
40	            // calculate the starting and entry point of the y-labels (depending on
41	            // zoom / contentrect bounds)
42	            let p1 = transformer.valueForTouchPoint(CGPoint(x: viewPortHandler.contentLeft, y: viewPortHandler.contentTop))
43	            let p2 = transformer.valueForTouchPoint(CGPoint(x: viewPortHandler.contentRight, y: viewPortHandler.contentTop))
44	
45	            min = inverted ? Double(p2.x) : Double(p1.x)
46	            max = inverted ? Double(p1.x) : Double(p2.x)
47	        }
48	        
49	        computeAxisValues(min: min, max: max)
50	    }
51	    
52	    open func computeAxisValues(min: Double, max: Double)
53	    {
54	        let yMin = min
55	        let yMax = max
56	
57	        let labelCount = axis.labelCount
58	        let range = abs(yMax - yMin)
59	
60	        guard
61	            labelCount != 0,
62	            range > 0,
63	            range.isFinite
64	            else
65	        {
66	            axis.entries = []
67	            axis.centeredEntries = []
68	            return
69	        }
70	
71	        // Find out how much spacing (in y value space) between axis values
72	        let rawInterval = range / Double(labelCount)
73	        var interval = rawInterval.roundedToNextSignificant()
74	
75	        // If granularity is enabled, then do not allow the interval to go below specified granularity.
76	        // This is used to avoid repeated values when rounding values for display.
77	        if axis.granularityEnabled
78	        {
79	            interval = Swift.max(interval, axis.granularity)
80	        }
81	
82	        // Normalize interval
83	        let intervalMagnitude = pow(10.0, Double(Int(log10(interval)))).roundedToNextSignificant()
84	        let intervalSigDigit = Int(interval / intervalMagnitude)
85	        if intervalSigDigit > 5
86	        {
87	            // Use one order of magnitude higher, to avoid intervals like 0.9 or 90
88	            interval = floor(10.0 * Double(intervalMagnitude))
89	        }
90	
91	        var n = axis.centerAxisLabelsEnabled ? 1 : 0
92	
93	        // force label count
94	        if axis.isForceLabelsEnabled
95	        {
96	            interval = range / Double(labelCount - 1)
97	
98	            // Ensure stops contains at least n elements.
99	            axis.entries.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
100	            axis.entries.reserveCapacity(labelCount)

100	            axis.entries.reserveCapacity(labelCount)
101	
102	            let values = stride(from: yMin, to: Double(labelCount) * interval + yMin, by: interval)
103	            axis.entries.append(contentsOf: values)
104	
105	            n = labelCount
106	        }
107	        else
108	        {
109	            // no forced count
110	
111	            var first = interval == 0.0 ? 0.0 : ceil(yMin / interval) * interval
112	
113	            if axis.centerAxisLabelsEnabled
114	            {
115	                first -= interval
116	            }
117	
118	            let last = interval == 0.0 ? 0.0 : (floor(yMax / interval) * interval).nextUp
119	
120	            if interval != 0.0, last != first
121	            {
122	                stride(from: first, through: last, by: interval).forEach { _ in n += 1 }
123	            }
124	
125	            // Ensure stops contains at least n elements.
126	            axis.entries.removeAll(keepingCapacity: true)
127	            axis.entries.reserveCapacity(labelCount)
128	
129	            let start = first, end = first + Double(n) * interval
130	
131	            // Fix for IEEE negative zero case (Where value == -0.0, and 0.0 == -0.0)
132	            let values = stride(from: start, to: end, by: interval).map { $0 == 0.0 ? 0.0 : $0 }
133	            axis.entries.append(contentsOf: values)
134	        }
135	
136	        // set decimals
137	        if interval < 1
138	        {
139	            axis.decimals = Int(ceil(-log10(interval)))
140	        }
141	        else
142	        {
143	            axis.decimals = 0
144	        }
145	
146	        if axis.centerAxisLabelsEnabled
147	        {
148	            let offset: Double = interval / 2.0
149	            axis.centeredEntries = axis.entries[..<n]
150	                .map { $0 + offset }
151	        }
152	        
153	        computeSize()
154	    }
155	    
156	    @objc open func computeSize()
157	    {
158	        let longest = axis.getLongestLabel()
159	        
160	        let labelSize = longest.size(withAttributes: [.font: axis.labelFont])
161	
162	        let labelWidth = labelSize.width
163	        let labelHeight = labelSize.height
164	        
165	        let labelRotatedSize = labelSize.rotatedBy(degrees: axis.labelRotationAngle)
166	        
167	        axis.labelWidth = labelWidth
168	        axis.labelHeight = labelHeight
169	        axis.labelRotatedWidth = labelRotatedSize.width
170	        axis.labelRotatedHeight = labelRotatedSize.height
171	    }
172	    
173	    open func renderAxisLabels(context: CGContext)
174	    {
175	        guard
176	            axis.isEnabled,
177	            axis.isDrawLabelsEnabled
178	            else { return }
179	
180	        let yOffset = axis.yOffset
181	        
182	        switch axis.labelPosition {
183	        case .top:
184	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentTop - yOffset, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 1.0))
185	
186	        case .topInside:
187	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentTop + yOffset + axis.labelRotatedHeight, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 1.0))
188	
189	        case .bottom:
190	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentBottom + yOffset, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 0.0))
191	
192	        case .bottomInside:
193	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentBottom - yOffset - axis.labelRotatedHeight, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 0.0))
194	
195	        case .bothSided:
196	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentTop - yOffset, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 1.0))
197	            drawLabels(context: context, pos: viewPortHandler.contentBottom + yOffset, anchor: CGPoint(x: 0.5, y: 0.0))
198	        }
199	    }

201	    private var axisLineSegmentsBuffer = [CGPoint](repeating: .zero, count: 2)
202	    
203	    open func renderAxisLine(context: CGContext)
204	    {
205	        guard
206	            axis.isEnabled,
207	            axis.isDrawAxisLineEnabled
208	            else { return }
209	
210	        context.saveGState()
211	        defer { context.restoreGState() }
212	        
213	        context.setStrokeColor(axis.axisLineColor.cgColor)
214	        context.setLineWidth(axis.axisLineWidth)
215	        if axis.axisLineDashLengths != nil
216	        {
217	            context.setLineDash(phase: axis.axisLineDashPhase, lengths: axis.axisLineDashLengths)
218	        }
219	        else
220	        {
221	            context.setLineDash(phase: 0.0, lengths: [])
222	        }
223	        
224	        if axis.labelPosition == .top
225	            || axis.labelPosition == .topInside
226	            || axis.labelPosition == .bothSided
227	        {
228	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[0].x = viewPortHandler.contentLeft
229	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[0].y = viewPortHandler.contentTop
230	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[1].x = viewPortHandler.contentRight
231	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[1].y = viewPortHandler.contentTop
232	            context.strokeLineSegments(between: axisLineSegmentsBuffer)
233	        }
234	        
235	        if axis.labelPosition == .bottom
236	            || axis.labelPosition == .bottomInside
237	            || axis.labelPosition == .bothSided
238	        {
239	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[0].x = viewPortHandler.contentLeft
240	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[0].y = viewPortHandler.contentBottom
241	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[1].x = viewPortHandler.contentRight
242	            axisLineSegmentsBuffer[1].y = viewPortHandler.contentBottom
243	            context.strokeLineSegments(between: axisLineSegmentsBuffer)
244	        }
245	    }
246	    
247	    /// draws the x-labels on the specified y-position
248	    @objc open func drawLabels(context: CGContext, pos: CGFloat, anchor: CGPoint)
249	    {
250	        guard let transformer = self.transformer else { return }
251	        
252	        let paraStyle = ParagraphStyle.default.mutableCopy() as! MutableParagraphStyle
253	        paraStyle.alignment = .center
254	        
255	        let labelAttrs: [NSAttributedString.Key : Any] = [.font: axis.labelFont,
256	                                                         .foregroundColor: axis.labelTextColor,
257	                                                         .paragraphStyle: paraStyle]
258	
259	        let labelRotationAngleRadians = axis.labelRotationAngle.DEG2RAD
260	        let isCenteringEnabled = axis.isCenterAxisLabelsEnabled
261	        let valueToPixelMatrix = transformer.valueToPixelMatrix
262	
263	        var position = CGPoint.zero
264	        var labelMaxSize = CGSize.zero
265	        
266	        if axis.isWordWrapEnabled
267	        {
268	            labelMaxSize.width = axis.wordWrapWidthPercent * valueToPixelMatrix.a
269	        }
270	        
271	        let entries = axis.entries
272	        
273	        for i in entries.indices
274	        {
275	            let px = isCenteringEnabled ? CGFloat(axis.centeredEntries[i]) : CGFloat(entries[i])
276	            position = CGPoint(x: px, y: 0)
277	                .applying(valueToPixelMatrix)
278	
279	            guard viewPortHandler.isInBoundsX(position.x) else { continue }
280	            
281	            let label = axis.valueFormatter?.stringForValue(axis.entries[i], axis: axis) ?? ""
282	            let labelns = label as NSString
283	            
284	            if axis.isAvoidFirstLastClippingEnabled
285	            {
286	                // avoid clipping of the last
287	                if i == axis.entryCount - 1 && axis.entryCount > 1
288	                {
289	                    let width = labelns.boundingRect(with: labelMaxSize, options: .usesLineFragmentOrigin, attributes: labelAttrs, context: nil).size.width
290	                    
291	                    if width > viewPortHandler.offsetRight * 2.0,
292	                        position.x + width > viewPortHandler.chartWidth
293	                    {
294	                        position.x -= width / 2.0
295	                    }
296	                }
297	                else if i == 0
298	                { // avoid clipping of the first
299	                    let width = labelns.boundingRect(with: labelMaxSize, options: .usesLineFragmentOrigin, attributes: labelAttrs, context: nil).size.width
300	                    position.x += width / 2.0
301	                }
302	            }
303	            
304	            drawLabel(context: context,
305	                      formattedLabel: label,
306	                      x: position.x,
307	                      y: pos,
308	                      attributes: labelAttrs,
309	                      constrainedTo: labelMaxSize,
310	                      anchor: anchor,
311	                      angleRadians: labelRotationAngleRadians)
312	        }
313	    }

315	    @objc open func drawLabel(

318	        x: CGFloat,
319	        y: CGFloat,
320	        attributes: [NSAttributedString.Key : Any],
321	        constrainedTo size: CGSize,
322	        anchor: CGPoint,
323	        angleRadians: CGFloat)
324	    {
325	        context.drawMultilineText(formattedLabel,
326	                                  at: CGPoint(x: x, y: y),
327	                                  constrainedTo: size,
328	                                  anchor: anchor,

330	                                  attributes: attributes)
